title: bit glyphs
body:
# bit glyph 

ascii art that transforms each block into a procedural character based on luminance
Each glyph is represented with a compact binary pattern
without use of textures and atlas

## characteristics

- 5x5 ascii rendering using bits
- Luminance mapping to clearly represent brightness
- 2x2 sampling to soften the effect
- original colors preserved
- It is designed to be light and efficient
- color saturation and unique color
- use opengl 3.3
